articles.title: IMAGES
articles.summary: SynthID can generate a watermark that is invisible to the human eye but easily caught by a dedicated AI detection tool. Google Cloud customers who use the Vertex AI platform and Imagen image generator will be able to embed and detect the watermark. Google hopes SynthID will become an internet-wide standard in the future.

articles.title: VIABLE MODERATION TOOL
articles.summary: Community Notes requires consensus among participant ratings for a note to be appended to a post. X is adding a “Needs Your Help” timeline to get more ratings in order to increase the number of live notes. X also updated its scoring algorithm to reduce the amount of notes that appear and disappear.

articles.title: 11 REAL SOCIAL MEDIA TRENDS FOR 2023
articles.summary: These trends help brands craft strategies that connect with audiences, enhance brand visibility, and drive business growth. They include creating content that educate and entertain in the form of bite-sized digestible formats, using employees as brand advocates on their personal social accounts, and tapping into the booming creator economy.

articles.title: VOICE SEARCH OPTIMIZATION: 6 TIPS TO IMPROVE YOUR RESULTS
articles.summary: As the number of digital voice assistants grows, people are using voice search more often. This article contains optimization tips including focusing on long-tail and question keywords, practicing local SEO, and improving your site's technical SEO.

articles.title: WHAT IS ON-PAGE SEO? TIPS AND EXAMPLES
articles.summary: This article covers 7 on-page SEO best practices to avoid wasting content marketing dollars. Create quality content for high impact keywords, like Asana did to rank for “morning routine” and related keywords. Next, bolster the content with effective metadata, header tags, optimized images, internal links, and mobile optimization.

articles.title: 7 INSPIRING CONTENT MARKETING EXAMPLES
articles.summary: This article contains campaigns and content from brands that performed well and provides reasons why. Examples include Adobe's free image background remover, Cars.com's auto loan calculator, and CoinDesk’s Bitcoin market data.

articles.title: 85% OF TITLES FEATURE KEYWORDS IN POSITIONS 1-5 OF GOOGLE
articles.summary: Title tags that include keywords rank in the top 5 positions of Google 85% of the time. Additionally, 90% of the rankings in the top 1-5 use either title or sentence case in titles and meta descriptions. It’s good to revisit fundamental SEO elements like these to ensure they’re not hurting your rankings.

articles.title: PROACTIVE DIGITAL ACCESSIBILITY: 5 STRATEGIES TO SHIFT LEFT
articles.summary: Digital accessibility isn’t only about being inclusive but also about fulfilling legal and ethical obligations. This article explores 5 strategies for weaving digital accessibility deeply into the fabric of your company.

articles.title: HOW A PICTURE FRAME COMPANY CATAPULTED TO BRAND MATTEL INC.
articles.summary: Mattel started by selling picture frames and using leftover wood to build dollhouse furniture before creating Barbie, Hot Wheels, and many other successful toys.

articles.title: AUTHORITIES
articles.summary: Sustainable Skylines just received FAA approval to fly drones with aerial ad banners. It is planning to start operations in Miami Beach before expanding.

articles.title: ELECTION CYCLE
articles.summary: With the 2024 presidential election approaching and the lack of regulation, there is concern that AI will be widely used to propagate political misinformation.
